_README: INPUTS for docs/under-the-hood/costs.md. Edit this file, then run `npm run docs:refresh`. Never edit costs.md directly — it is generated and your edits will be destroyed.
_HONESTY_RULE: Any number you have not personally verified against a real invoice or a published price sheet MUST stay listed in `verify` below. Anything in `verify` is rendered with a VERIFY flag in the output. This document is shown to partners and investors — an unflagged guess presented as fact is the one failure mode that matters here.

notes.planPriceUsd: THERE IS NO PRICING MODEL. The app has one tenant (OGBA) and charges nothing. Until a price is set, revenue and margin are structurally zero — not low, undefined.
notes.primaryVariablePerUnit: The main per-use cost is AI. Two providers are in play: Claude Sonnet via raw fetch to api.anthropic.com (server/src/services/aiAnalysisService.ts) and Gemini 2.5 Flash as a fallback. Needs: (a) actual per-analysis token counts, (b) current per-token prices for both models. Neither is known.
notes.perUserMonthAuth: Supabase Auth. Free tier today. Needs the paid-tier MAU price and the free-tier ceiling.
notes.perUserMonthDb: Supabase Postgres. Free tier today — which is also why DATABASE_URL and DIRECT_URL must both use the pooler with connection_limit=1 (free-tier direct connection is IPv6-only and fails from Railway).
notes.hostingFlatMonth: Railway — one service serving both API and static client. Actual monthly bill is not recorded anywhere in this repo.
notes.paymentPctFee: NOT APPLICABLE TODAY. There is no payment processor in this codebase. The venmoHandle / zelleHandle / paypalHandle fields on user profiles are stored text only — league members settle entry fees and payouts manually, outside the app. The 2.9% + $0.30 defaults are a placeholder for if that ever changes.
notes.unaccountedServices: Not yet modelled as line items: Resend (transactional email), PostHog (product analytics), web-push/VAPID, Cloudflare (DNS/CDN), YouTube API. Most are plausibly free at current scale, but 'plausibly free' is an assumption, not a verified zero.
